steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to provide an overview of the NWR program — a broad, program-level statement, not a detail about one specific refuge.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'The US's more than 500 NWRS protect endangered species from coast to coast.': Covers the program's scale (500+), purpose (protect endangered species), and geographic reach (coast to coast) in one sentence. This is a genuine overview. ✓
  • Choice B — 'Both the Crocodile Lake NWR and the Nestucca Bay NWR were established to protect endangered species.': Focuses on two specific refuges, not the program as a whole. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Oregon's Nestucca Bay NWR was established to protect the endangered Aleutian Canada goose.': A detail about one refuge only. ✗
  • Choice D — 'One of more than 500 NWRS in the US, the Crocodile Lake NWR encompasses 6,686 acres in Florida.': Centers on a specific refuge and an acreage detail — not a program overview. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
